filters.notes: kQ1ShipdateMax = 9283 (1998-09-02 days since epoch). Zone map skips blocks where zone_min[b] > 9283 (trailing ~2% of 600 blocks). Per-row check within surviving blocks.

data_structures.block_skip: zone_map — skip block b if zone_min[b] > 9283; no lower-bound skip needed (upper-bound filter only)
data_structures.aggregation: direct_array[6] — key = l_returnflag * 2 + l_linestatus; 6 slots fit in a few cache lines; one private array per thread to avoid false sharing
data_structures.merge: reduction over thread-local arrays after parallel scan completes

scan.simd: avx512 — vectorize double arithmetic (extendedprice, discount, tax) using AVX-512F; process 8 doubles/cycle for disc_price and charge computations

aggregation_state.post_scan: avg_qty = sum_qty / count; avg_price = sum_base_price / count; avg_disc = sum_disc_for_avg / count

parallelism.thread_local: each thread holds its own direct_array[6] accumulator; merge via summation after all morsels complete
parallelism.notes: 600 blocks / 64 threads ≈ 9–10 blocks per thread; low coordination overhead

indexes.purpose: skip_blocks — prune entire 100K-row blocks where zone_min[b] > kQ1ShipdateMax; eliminates trailing ~12 blocks (~2% of data)

output.sort_strategy: emit slots 0..5 in key order; omit slots with count == 0; no runtime sort needed since key = returnflag*2+linestatus is already ascending
